'''dachofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mealymouthedness|mealymouthedness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ch-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mealymouthedness|mealymouthedness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dachofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæchefeth|dæchefeth]] || [[word:dæchefej|dæchefej]] || [[word:dæchefesh|dæchefesh]] || [[word:dæchefe|dæchefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dachochofoth|dachochofoth]] || [[word:dachochofoj|dachochofoj]] || [[word:dachochofosh|dachochofosh]] || [[word:dachochofo|dachochofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dachofoth|dachofoth]] || [[word:dachofoj|dachofoj]] || [[word:dachofosh|dachofosh]] || [[word:dachofo|dachofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dachoffoth|dachoffoth]] || [[word:dachoffoj|dachoffoj]] || [[word:dachoffosh|dachoffosh]] || [[word:dachoffof|dachoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dachofotho|dachofotho]] || [[word:dachofojo|dachofojo]] || [[word:dachofosho|dachofosho]] || [[word:dachofoko|dachofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dachofoth|dachofoth]] || [[word:dachofoj|dachofoj]] || [[word:dachofosh|dachofosh]] || [[word:dachofo|dachofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dachofothol|dachofothol]] || [[word:dachofojol|dachofojol]] || [[word:dachofoshol|dachofoshol]] || [[word:dachofokol|dachofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dachofothotho|dachofothotho]] || [[word:dachofojojo|dachofojojo]] || [[word:dachofoshosho|dachofoshosho]] || [[word:dachofoko|dachofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dachofothon|dachofothon]] || [[word:dachofojon|dachofojon]] || [[word:dachofoshon|dachofoshon]] || [[word:dachofokon|dachofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dachofothoro|dachofothoro]] || [[word:dachofojoro|dachofojoro]] || [[word:dachofoshoro|dachofoshoro]] || [[word:dachofokoro|dachofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
